classes.reasoning: This is a tabular dataset capturing per-patient, per-cycle adverse event data including patient codes, site IDs, ECOG status, biomarkers (EGFR_MUT, HER2_AMP), AE terms, MedDRA coding, grades, seriousness, causality, actions, and outcomes—characteristic of a Case Report Form used for systematic data collection during the trial.

intervention: Not explicitly named in the dataset; EGFR-targeting agent inferred from EGFR mutation screening and characteristic toxicity profile (acneiform dermatitis, diarrhea, pneumonitis, paronychia)
indication: Oncology (lung cancer with EGFR mutations implied by biomarker fields EX19DEL and L858R)
summary: This document is a Case Report Form (CRF) containing adverse event data from the BIORCE-ONC-2023-001 clinical trial. It captures standardized per-patient safety data across multiple European sites, including demographics, biomarker status, adverse event verbatim terms, MedDRA-coded preferred terms and system organ classes, CTCAE grades, causality assessments, and management actions.
content:
